name: moonweave-governance
description: Moonweave AI governance, planning, RFC, engineering, security, quality, release, research, and knowledge management skills.

interface.longDescription: Route, plan, review, secure, validate, release and document Moonweave AI projects using focused skills and deterministic checks.
defaultPrompt: Route this task through the Moonweave governance lifecycle.
Review this pull request using Moonweave security and quality gates.
Audit this repository and produce a prioritized remediation plan.
